title: StarCraftFantasy
body:
---
StarCraftFantasy is Fabric 1.21 Fantasy Modpack. That has 280+ mods to make minecraft into a giant fantasy modpack. That adds a lot of new things into minecraft and makes into a very magical modpack

---
**ALWAYS BACK UP YOUR WORLDS WHEN YOU UPDATE THE MODPACK**

---
![The sky of the night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zTlpT1WE/images/2c75f51ba75beb42166964f5ebc0b05ce6d776c9.png)

---

Some of the modpack main features
- More Structures
- Magic System
- New Bosses
- QOL Mods
---
